summary: Deploy reliability: tolerate zero-replica cohort services and pass explicit admin replicas

changes.description: Release cohort gating now skips task-readiness waits for services explicitly scaled to 0 replicas when their service spec already points at the expected image tag, preventing false deploy failures on intentionally suspended services.
Deploys now pass an explicit MZ_PHP_FPM_ADMIN_REPLICAS value alongside cron suspension so admin PHP-FPM replica counts stay independent from cron replica overrides.
